positive: A magnificent, symmetrical arrangement featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and stylized celestial elements. The central focus is a swirling vortex of nebula colors intersecting with the detailed silhouette of giant, exotic lilies and glowing phosphorescent fauna. Use high contrast deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, electric lavender, and touches of metallic gold accents. The overall style should be a blend of ethereal watercolor ink wash and elegant neo-art deco line work, creating a clean, striking pattern suitable for textile printing. The composition must be highly symmetrical and designed to repeat seamlessly.
negative: blurry, amateur, jpeg artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, low contrast, boring, grainy, noise
